narrative:
Pierce Township C (precinct in Clermont County) has 600 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.5 percentage points.
